name: Chicken Fried Rice
description: A quick skillet dinner with tender chicken, rice, egg, vegetables, and soy sauce.
instructions: Warm sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add diced chicken and cook until lightly browned and cooked through.
Push the chicken aside, scramble the eggs in the pan, then fold them into the chicken.
Add rice, peas, carrots, green onion, and soy sauce.
Stir-fry until the rice is hot and lightly crisp at the edges.

name: Vegetable Stir Fry
description: Crisp vegetables tossed in a simple garlic-ginger soy sauce.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a wok or skillet over high heat.
Add broccoli, bell pepper, carrot, and snap peas.
Cook, stirring often, until the vegetables are crisp-tender.
Add garlic, ginger, and soy sauce.
Toss for one minute, then serve hot over rice or noodles.

name: Tomato Pasta
description: A pantry-friendly pasta with a bright tomato, onion, garlic, and basil sauce.
instructions: Cook pasta in salted water until just tender.
Warm olive oil in a saucepan and cook onion until soft.
Add garlic and tomato, then simmer until the sauce thickens.
Toss pasta with sauce and basil.
Serve warm with extra basil if available.

name: Spinach Tomato Omelette
description: A fluffy breakfast omelette with spinach, tomato, onion, and cheese.
instructions: Whisk eggs with a pinch of salt and pepper.
Cook onion, tomato, and spinach in butter until softened.
Pour in eggs and cook until the edges begin to set.
Sprinkle cheese over one side and fold the omelette.
Cook one more minute, then slide onto plates.

name: Black Bean Rice Bowl
description: A filling bowl with rice, beans, corn, avocado, salsa, and lime.
instructions: Warm rice, black beans, and corn in a skillet.
Divide the mixture among bowls.
Top each bowl with avocado, salsa, and a squeeze of lime.
Drizzle with olive oil and season to taste.
Serve immediately.

name: Bean Tacos
description: Soft tacos filled with seasoned beans, vegetables, cheese, and lime.
instructions: Warm olive oil in a skillet and cook onion and bell pepper until tender.
Add black beans and corn, then cook until hot.
Warm tortillas in a dry skillet.
Fill tortillas with the bean mixture and cheese.
Finish with lime juice before serving.

name: Grilled Cheese
description: A crisp, melty sandwich made with bread, cheese, and butter.
instructions: Butter one side of each bread slice.
Place cheese between the unbuttered sides of the bread.
Cook sandwiches in a skillet over medium heat.
Flip once the bread is golden and crisp.
Cook until the second side is golden and the cheese melts.

name: Lentil Soup
description: A hearty soup with lentils, vegetables, tomato, broth, and spinach.
instructions: Cook onion, carrot, and celery in olive oil until softened.
Add lentils, tomato, and vegetable broth.
Simmer until lentils are tender.
Stir in spinach and cook until wilted.
Taste and season before serving.

name: Tuna Salad Sandwich
description: A simple tuna salad sandwich with celery, lettuce, and creamy mayo.
instructions: Drain tuna and flake it with a fork.
Mix tuna with mayonnaise and chopped celery.
Layer lettuce on bread slices.
Add tuna salad and close the sandwiches.
Slice and serve chilled or at room temperature.

name: Loaded Baked Potato
description: A baked potato topped with broccoli, cheese, yogurt, and green onion.
instructions: Bake potatoes until tender when pierced with a fork.
Steam broccoli until bright and tender.
Split potatoes and fluff the centers with butter.
Top with broccoli, cheese, yogurt, and green onion.
Return to the oven briefly if you want the cheese melted.

name: Chicken Noodle Soup
description: A comforting soup with chicken, noodles, carrots, celery, onion, and broth.
instructions: Cook onion, carrot, and celery in olive oil until just softened.
Add chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
Add chicken and simmer until cooked through.
Stir in noodles and cook until tender.
Shred the chicken, return it to the soup, and serve warm.

name: Smoothie Bowl
description: A thick fruit bowl with banana, berries, almond milk, oats, peanut butter, and chia.
instructions: Blend banana, berries, almond milk, and half the oats until thick.
Pour into bowls.
Top with remaining oats, peanut butter, and chia seeds.
Add extra berries if available.
Serve immediately while cold.
